transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-20]
[00:00] You: Conference preparation for DevSummit 2026. Our talk is accepted — let's plan.
[00:45] Speaker 1: The conference is October 12th through 14th. We need to get there the day before, so travel is October 11th.
[01:20] Speaker 2: The slide deck submission deadline to the conference organizers is September 28th. That's non-negotiable.
[01:55] Speaker 3: I'd like to do a dry run two weeks before submission — so around September 14th.
[02:30] Speaker 1: The abstract is already accepted, but the full talk description needs to be in their system by August 1st.
[03:00] You: What about demo prep?
[03:15] Speaker 2: The demo environment needs to be stable before our dry run. Let me aim to have a working demo by September 7th.
[03:50] Speaker 3: I'll write the talk script by August 22nd so we have time to review and revise before the dry run.
[04:20] Speaker 1: We also need to submit our A/V requirements to the conference by September 15th — screen aspect ratio, microphone preference, etc.
[04:55] You: Good. The conference organizers have a speaker dinner on the evening of October 12th. We should all plan to attend.
[05:20] Speaker 2: I'll book our flights and hotel. Flights to the venue take about 4 hours, so I'll aim to book everything by next Monday — July 27th.
[05:50] You: And post-conference, I'd like us to write up a summary blog post within a week of returning, so by October 22nd or so.

action_items.description: Submit full talk description to conference system
action_items.source_quote: the full talk description needs to be in their system by August 1st.

action_items.description: Have working demo environment ready before dry run
action_items.source_quote: Let me aim to have a working demo by September 7th.
I'll write the talk script by August 22nd so we have time to review and revise before the dry run.

action_items.description: Book flights and hotel for conference
action_items.source_quote: I'll book our flights and hotel. Flights to the venue take about 4 hours, so I'll aim to book everything by next Monday — July 27th.

decisions: All speakers will attend the conference speaker dinner on October 12th
